strengths: The regime filter successfully improved performance over its parent spec, increasing the aggregate Win Rate from 95.9% to an exceptional 97.3%.
Achieved an outstanding aggregate expectancy of +6.81 bps over a very large sample size of 2,886 trades, confirming a highly profitable and robust signal.
The signal is particularly effective on symbol 000660, where it achieved a perfect 100% Win Rate on two of the three test sessions and an average expectancy of +10.58 bps.
weaknesses: The signal's profitability is highly symbol-dependent. The average expectancy for symbol 000660 (+10.58 bps) is nearly double that of symbol 005930 (+5.33 bps), indicating the underlying market microstructure it captures is not uniform.
Win Rate varies across sessions, with a low of 90.7% for 005930 on one day, a 9.3 percentage point spread from the 100% WR achieved on 000660, supporting the 'mixed' consistency rating.
win_bucket_insight: The core strength of this signal comes from its successful application of a time-based regime filter. By avoiding the chaotic first 15 minutes of the trading session, it systematically sidesteps a major source of losses identified in its parent spec.
loss_bucket_insight: The remaining losses, though infrequent, tend to occur during brief, unexpected volatility spikes in the mid-session where the established price trend momentarily breaks down faster than the 10-tick horizon.
recommended_direction_reasoning: This spec has achieved an elite WR of 97.3% and expectancy of +6.81 bps over 2,886 trades. Further threshold tightening or filtering offers minimal upside. Given its confirmed status as a top-tier signal, the most productive next step is to combine it with another high-performing, non-correlated spec from this iteration to build an even more robust ensemble.
